item.title: Grocery Stores, Society, Parents - Smartypants
item.description:
Hank organizes grocery stores. Paul improves society. Lorena bets on her parents' attention.

Duration: 33:45

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, lorena russi, paul robalino, hank green

item.title: February, Concerts, Monsters - Smartypants
item.description:
Emma cancels February. Jess explains why concerts suck. Jon criticizes sexy monsters.

Duration: 29:56

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, emma choi, jessica ross, jon matteson
